description.value: Price 14,665 gp; Slot armor; CL 11th; Weight 25 lbs.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION In addition to granting a +3 enhancement bonus to AC, it has a -1 armor check penalty and grants the wearer 4d6 additional points of damage on the first successful charge attack she makes in a round, including a mounted charge. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 7,415 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells bull’s strength
